name: Template Improvement

## Source of Feedback

- [ ] I completed a case study using this template
- [ ] I reviewed the template without completing a full case study
- [ ] I'm an instructor who used case studies created with this template
- [ ] Other:

**Template Version Used**: <!-- e.g., 1.0.0 - check TEMPLATE_VERSION file -->

## Improvement Category

Select the area this improvement relates to:

- [ ] Methodology / Process
- [ ] Template Files (PROMPTS.md, etc.)
- [ ] Claude Code Skills
- [ ] Documentation (README, guides)
- [ ] GitHub Actions / CI
- [ ] Configuration (case-config.yaml)
- [ ] Folder Structure
- [ ] Other:

## Current Behavior

<!-- What does the template currently do (or not do)? Be specific. -->

## Proposed Improvement

<!-- What change would you like to see? Include examples if helpful. -->

## Rationale

<!-- Why would this improvement help? What problem does it solve? -->

## Implementation Suggestion

<!-- Optional: If you have ideas on how to implement this change -->

## Additional Context

<!--
- Screenshots or examples
- Links to your retrospective
- Related issues
-->

## Impact Assessment

How significant is this improvement?

- [ ] **High** - Would significantly improve case study development
- [ ] **Medium** - Would enhance the experience
- [ ] **Low** - Minor refinement
